title: A Resolution Commending and Congratulating the Municipal Nutrition Action Office (MNAO) Through Ms. Madeleine M. Alforja, Municipal Nutrition Action Officer (MNAO) for Being the Outstanding Nutrition Honor Award Performer in the 2023 Calabarzon Regional Nutrition Awarding Ceremony Held Last August 1, 2023 at Seda Nuvali, Santa Rosa City, Laguna. Councilor(s) Leren Mae M. Bautista, Marlo Pj A. Alipon, Jonathan Bryan S. Siytiap, Mark Lester B. Dizon, Benedicto S. Alborida, Mike Dexter A. Concio,
